title: Undertake research project
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake research project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define topic

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and scope research issue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and scope research issue.
